message:
feat(mermaid): add journey diagram layout + score rendering (bd-hudcn.1.8.2)

Journey diagrams now get a dedicated section-based layout engine
instead of the generic Sugiyama algorithm:

- Custom layout_journey_diagram() groups tasks by section vertically
- Score bars (●●●○○) in task labels replace raw numeric scores
- Actor names included in task labels when present
- Score-based fill colors (green→red gradient, 1-5 scale)
- journey_score_N CSS classes on nodes for renderer dispatch
- 3 new tests: score bar, score classes, actor labels

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
